series_metadata.series_description: Formal Actions: ethics grievance certified to action; Files containing information pertaining to formal actions against licensees, which include copies of Board Orders, consent agreements, notices of opportunity for hearing, appellate decisions and entries, probationary modifications, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 10 years - Retain physical file, if it was not scanned, for a period of 10 years from the date of final appeal; then, shred physical file. ; Electronic: 10 years - Retain electronic medium for a period of 10 years from the date of final appeal; then, delete electronic medium., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
